subcodes.first_line: O ye cherished companions! Though enshrined in mystic veils and wrapped in the mantle of concealment, the Sun of Truth nevertheless shineth forth from every direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جانی شمس حقیقت در حلل غیب و نقاب بطون مجلل ولی اشراق از کل جهات
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
